title: Velvety Fermented Oregano Stir-fry
description: A brunch-mood Australian dish featuring oregano and a fermented base for a unique flavor profile that's perfect for plant-based diners.

ingredients.name: Salt to taste
ingredients.notes: Adjust based on the saltiness of your oregano paste

instructions: Heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and stir for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Gradually add fermented oregano paste, stirring constantly to prevent burning. Cook for another minute.
Reduce heat to low and add the remaining tablespoon of olive oil. Add diced red bell pepper, broccoli florets, and kale leaves. Stir well to combine with the garlic mixture.
Add chickpeas and continue to stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Stir in salt as needed based on taste preference. Serve hot.
